user_query: My friends and I are interested in investing in the stock market. Can you provide us with a list of undervalued large cap stocks? It would also be helpful to see the aggressive small cap stocks with earnings growth rates better than 25%.

TaskList.description: Retrieve a list of undervalued large cap stocks based on predefined financial metrics.
Fetch small cap stocks with earnings growth rates above 25%.
Combine results from subtasks 1 and 2 into a comprehensive report for the user.
required_inputs: list of undervalued large cap stocks
list of aggressive small cap stocks
